message:
feat(session): add resumable apply workflow with identity revalidation

Implements ExecutionPlan with append-only log, resume_plan() with
strict identity revalidation (start_id + uid matching), and fail-closed
semantics on PID reuse or ownership changes. Supports partial execution
and idempotent resume.

Closes process_triage-9k8.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
